policy: Agents identify as agents on public surfaces. External-facing actions require human approval unless a written mandate says otherwise.

agents.name: Herald
agents.scope: Market presence and outbound support under Gustav approval.

agents.name: Forge
agents.scope: Software implementation, verification, and local artifact production under operator instruction.

agents.name: Scribe
agents.scope: Canon capture, summaries, and internal record keeping.

internal_note: Mission Control and Agent Atlas are internal operating surfaces, not public product surfaces.
